issues.description: DSL is missing the passive ability: 'This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards.' This requires a Counter or damage prevention mechanic that is completely absent.

OnPlay action is incomplete. The effect should: (1) look at 5 cards from deck, (2) reveal up to 1 red Event, (3) add it to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only performs a generic SearchDeck with no filtering for red Events, no deck viewing limit of 5, and no bottom placement logic.
Filter should specify 'red Event' cards only, not 'Any'. Current filter allows searching any card type.
Missing condition: the search is limited to 'up to 1' card, implying a count/quantity limit that is not expressed in the DSL.
